texts.full_text: oward, Chief Judge, Lynch and Kayatta, Circuit Judges. Angela G. Lehman on brief, for appellant. Julia M. Meconiates, Assistant United States Attorney, Rosa Emilia Rodríguez-Vélez, United States Attorney, and Mariana E. Bauzá-Almonte, Assistant United States Attorney, on brief, for appellee. March 29, 2019 HOWARD, Chief Judge. In this appeal, Heriberto Ortíz- Mercado challenges his sentence following his guilty plea to one count of possession of a firearm by a convicted felon in violation of 18 U.S.C. §§ 922(g)(1) and 924(a)(2).
